baseline.description: Fresh workspace synced to the seeded stream with no local changes
expectations: listPendingChangelists returns an empty list or only the default changelist when explicitly populated
previewSync returns no pending items after the initial sync

reconcile_preview.description: Local workspace mutations used to verify reconcile preview parsing
localChanges: delete seed/docs/guide/getting-started.md from the workspace copy
add a new untracked file at seed/src/app/new-feature.txt

opened_files.description: Workspace with files already opened in numbered and default changelists
expectations: listPendingChangelists returns numbered changelists and optionally the default changelist
getOpenedFiles returns a flat list with changelist metadata
getChangelistFiles returns only the files for the requested changelist

sync_preview.description: Workspace behind the server head revision to verify sync preview parsing
expectations: previewSync returns one item per pending file update
previewSync.totalCount matches the number of returned items
